stemHtml: For a planned flight with augmented crew, one crew member is unable to complete the duty within the Flight Duty Period. There are NO unforeseen circumstances. Can this duty be extended?

options.b: Yes, even if no adequate rest is available on board.
options.c: Yes, but only up to 3 hours since the crew is augmented.
options.d: Yes, in consultation with the commander of the flight.
